description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a short-sleeve V-neck shirt, fitted pants, and slip-on shoes. He wears fingerless gloves on both hands and sports a beanie hat, along with sunglasses that cover his eyes. The figure has a well-groomed beard and mustache, and his hair is styled to be visible beneath the beanie. The overall build is average, with a relaxed but upright posture and arms extended horizontally. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, streetwise appearance suitable for city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a beanie, sunglasses, fingerless gloves, and slip-on shoes, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has a beard and a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the beanie, sunglasses, beard, V-neck shirt, gloves, and full facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the beanie's fit, and the arm's extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the beanie, shirt, pants, and shoes, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and side of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve V-neck shirt, fitted pants, slip-on shoes, beanie, fingerless gloves, sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tucked under a beanie
